context: Tests whether the agent correctly computes stage-to-stage rates, compares them to D2C industry benchmarks, identifies the biggest revenue leak using the correct formula, flags the device gap, and structures the output with the required sections.

checklist.name: Correct output file path
checklist.description: Report is written to journey-reports/funnel-2026-05-12.md (matching the journey-reports/funnel-<YYYY-MM-DD>.md pattern)

checklist.name: Funnel snapshot table
checklist.description: Report includes a table with all four funnel stages (Sessions, Cart additions, Reached checkout, Completed checkout) with volumes and stage-to-stage rates

checklist.name: Industry benchmark comparison
checklist.description: Report compares stage-to-stage rates to industry benchmarks — specifically cart addition rate (8-12%), checkout reach rate (40-55%), checkout completion rate (65-80%), or overall conversion (1.5-3%)

checklist.name: Biggest leak quantified
checklist.description: Report identifies the largest drop-off stage and calculates or estimates the revenue being lost (uses volume drop × AOV or revenue_per_completed_checkout logic)

checklist.name: Mobile UX flag
checklist.description: Report flags that mobile conversion rate is more than 60% below desktop conversion rate (mobile ~0.94% vs desktop ~3.09% in the data) as a mobile UX issue

checklist.name: Device breakdown table
checklist.description: Report includes a table or section showing conversion rate by device type (desktop, mobile, tablet)

checklist.name: Period-over-period section
checklist.description: Report includes a period-over-period or week-over-week comparison section based on the comparison data provided

checklist.name: Significant WoW change flagged
checklist.description: Report flags the week of 2026-05-04 where conversion rate dropped ~-0.21pp WoW (which represents more than a meaningful change) as a notable signal

checklist.name: Prioritized recommendations
checklist.description: Report includes recommendations organized by priority (P0/P1/P2 or equivalent) with mobile fix at the top given severity

checklist.name: TL;DR section
checklist.description: Report opens with a TL;DR section that states overall conversion rate, biggest leak stage, and root cause hypothesis

checklist.name: Open questions section
checklist.description: Report includes an Open questions section listing things to investigate further
